targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp AS time, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2) AS binance FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol = '${base}USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY 1s ALIGN TO CALENDAR
SELECT timestamp AS time, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2) AS bybit FROM bybit_bookticker WHERE symbol = '${base}USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY 1s ALIGN TO CALENDAR
SELECT timestamp AS time, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2) AS bitget FROM bitget_bookticker WHERE symbol = '${base}USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY 1s ALIGN TO CALENDAR
SELECT timestamp AS time, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2) AS gate FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol = '${base}USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY 1s ALIGN TO CALENDAR
SELECT timestamp AS time, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2) AS flipster FROM flipster_bookticker WHERE symbol = '${base}USDT.PERP' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY 1s ALIGN TO CALENDAR

panels.title: ${base} spread bp — others vs binance
panels.description: ((other_mid - binance_mid) / binance_mid) * 10000. Positive = other exchange richer than binance.

targets.rawSql: WITH b AS (SELECT timestamp time, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2) m FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol = '${base}USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY 1s ALIGN TO CALENDAR), x AS (SELECT timestamp time, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2) m FROM bybit_bookticker WHERE symbol = '${base}USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY 1s ALIGN TO CALENDAR) SELECT b.time, (x.m - b.m)/b.m*10000 AS bybit FROM b ASOF JOIN x

WITH b AS (SELECT timestamp time, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2) m FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol = '${base}USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY 1s ALIGN TO CALENDAR), x AS (SELECT timestamp time, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2) m FROM bitget_bookticker WHERE symbol = '${base}USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY 1s ALIGN TO CALENDAR) SELECT b.time, (x.m - b.m)/b.m*10000 AS bitget FROM b ASOF JOIN x

WITH b AS (SELECT timestamp time, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2) m FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol = '${base}USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY 1s ALIGN TO CALENDAR), x AS (SELECT timestamp time, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2) m FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol = '${base}USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY 1s ALIGN TO CALENDAR) SELECT b.time, (x.m - b.m)/b.m*10000 AS gate FROM b ASOF JOIN x

WITH b AS (SELECT timestamp time, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2) m FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol = '${base}USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY 1s ALIGN TO CALENDAR), x AS (SELECT timestamp time, avg((bid_price+ask_price)/2) m FROM flipster_bookticker WHERE symbol = '${base}USDT.PERP' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY 1s ALIGN TO CALENDAR) SELECT b.time, (x.m - b.m)/b.m*10000 AS flipster FROM b ASOF JOIN x
